title: Blockchain Transaction Flow & Verification Process
description: A visual breakdown of the key components and their interactions in a typical blockchain transaction, from initiation to final consensus.
relationships: Sends a signed transaction to the network
Nodes validate the transaction using consensus rules
Validated transactions are grouped into a new block
New block is cryptographically linked (hashed) to the previous one
The updated ledger is distributed across all nodes
Recipient's balance is updated upon block confirmation
